name: Creamy Peanut Butter Fudge
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the first three ingredients in a large, heavy saucepan.
2. Bring to a boil over medium-high heat, stirring constantly.
3. Cover and cook for 3 minutes without stirring.
4. Uncover and continue boiling for an additional 5 minutes (do not stir).
5. Remove from heat and add the peanut butter morsels, stirring until they melt.
6. Stir in the marshmallow creme and vanilla extract.
7. Pour into a buttered 13x9x2-inch pan.
8. Allow to cool at room temperature for about 10 minutes or place in the freezer for the same duration.
Yield: 3 lbs.
